[Signicade Deluxe A-Frame](https://www.banners.com/banner-stands/signicade-deluxe-a-frame-black) 5. Black Signicade Deluxe A-Frame Kit # Black Signicade Deluxe A-Frame Kit: With 36" x 24" Signs The Black Signicade Deluxe A-Frame Kit is the ultimate solution for outdoor advertising, featuring durable hardware and two vibrant 36" x 24" full-color signs. This water-resistant, maintenance-free plastic A-frame is designed for maximum stability. Molded handles ensure easy transport, making setup and relocation a breeze. For custom double-sided printed signs, please contact our customer service representative. ![Black Signicade Deluxe A Frame with (2) 36x24 Signs](https://lag.azureedge.net/w2pcache/f8312bc6-c74f-401e-bca4-c21c8e634b46.jpg) Material Choice: 4 mm Coroplast Signs (2) Product: with Black Signicade Deluxe A Frame Hardware Quantity: (Min: 1, Max: 1000) Size (H x W): 36" x 24" 36" x 24" ![Loading product options](/includes/Images/loadingBar.gif) Loading product options...
